name: Yelorna

requirements.initiate:
to have 5 cult skills at 50%+ one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity, Examiners need
to be convinced at 3 of them.

cultSkills:
to be convinced at 3 of them.
Rune levels  need to have 3 cult skills at 100% one of which needs to be Cult Runic Affinity

Be a virgin
pledged to celibacy. Obtain an unicorn Bold skills are mandatory
Cult Skills (Oath is taken at initiate)
Combat style with spear
holyDays:
Sea/Death/Fire, Fire/Death/Fire, Earth/Death/Fire, Dark/Death/Fire, Storm/Death/Fire
Rune Meanings: Death: Death, Separation, Endings, Opposite To Life

Fire: Fire, Sky, Purity, Light, Stars, The
Sky Dome
